violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer to be sanitized before use. Proper sanitizing procedures reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

Various foods were observed held below 135 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was in unit for less than 2 hours. PIC given option to cool, reheat, or dispose of product. PIC elected to pull product. Food to be temped to ensure food maintains a temperature above 135. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

Food available for self service was lacking the required ingredient information. All ingredients, sub ingredient, and allergens must be available to the consumer. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Per PIC, class will be held to get more people certified in food safety. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Staff instructed on how and when to sanitize all equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of the slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was broken down to be sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

Sandwiches packaged in the food establishment are lacking some of the required information (allergen information.) Baked goods case has items available for self service lacking required information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, allergens, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

Various foods in the prep unit and display case were observed held at 46-53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All food was stored in units overnight and voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the display refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023
Baked goods in the establishment are available for self-service. Food labels with ingredients/allergens must be available for customers. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023

Boxes of chips/single service items were observed stored on the floor in the sales floor and back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023

The display case and prep unit near the entrance to the kitchen were unable to keep an ambient temperature below 41. Both units were taken out of service and the PIC must inform all staff to not use units until repaired/serviced/replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023

Vacuum packaged fish was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
The following equipment were observed in poor repair: 1) A small prep unit in the kitchen area was not holding adequate ambient temp New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
The plumbing under the three bay sink was in poor repair (leak observed). New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
